description: User wants a custom visual card no built-in template fits — a comparison dashboard. Agent should design a custom HTML template via dynamic_timeline_ui and create a completed card using it.

input.content: Make me a nice visual timeline card comparing three laptops I'm weighing: MacBook Air M3 ($1099, 1.24kg, 18h battery), ThinkPad X1 Carbon ($1399, 1.12kg, 15h), Framework 13 ($1049, 1.3kg, 10h). I want a dashboard-style comparison, not a plain list.
